title.en: At the very least, it can't be worse than the o...

content.en:
In the following years, Ye Tian began to arrange his endless national capital, which was naturally extremely luxurious, and used various precious materials to arrange various powerful large arrays.

At the very least, it can't be worse than the original Auganda capital.

In addition, he also has to choose a group of escort teams, which will focus on training, and there are naturally many human geniuses who want to join the escort team.

Of course, all kinds of trivial matters are handled by his son Ye Xingchen himself.

As time passed, the Endless Realm was growing rapidly, and some of these humans even combined with each other to give birth to offspring, and these descendants were united to each other.

The point is, the gestation speed of human beings is too fast!

Even if it is difficult for powerful humans to give birth to offspring, they are still reproducing faster than other races, but they are too fast.

After a long period of time, the number of this group of human beings has become hundreds of millions, and they were originally human powerhouses, and the descendants born naturally have strong bloodlines and fast cultivation speeds, plus the Endless Realm is full of chance treasures.

Therefore, this group of human beings quickly became stronger, and gradually formed one family after another, and all over the endless kingdom, huge cities were built, and gradually became the appearance of the eternal kingdom~.

However, once the hundreds of millions of Dao Era years have passed, eighty percent of the territory has to be ceded, otherwise the Nine-Extreme Alliance will make trouble for him.

Ye Tian doesn't care about anything now, he works hard to cultivate.

After becoming the lord of the Eternal Realm, his cultivation speed has accelerated, refining resources faster, improving faster, and his comprehension has also been blessed, and he has been fully blessed in all aspects.

In addition, after the opening of the Endless Kingdom, he was able to obtain the first batch of resources, which was also the reason why every Eternal Realm Lord was not weak.

If it is still weak under such blessings, it will be too wasteful!

But if it's scrap wood, it's impossible to get the Eternal State Order!

Before you know it, the 10 million years of the Dao Era have passed.

On this day, he collected another batch of resources, including six Eternal Primordial Treasures and a batch of resources that would help improve the Eternal Dao Body.

Of course, there are still many resources that have been taken away by those humans, and some of them have risen rapidly, which should have been a great opportunity, but Ye Tian will not snatch their opportunity.

And his relatives have also gained a lot of resources and benefits, and their strength is also improving rapidly.

Coupled with his Eternal Demon Crystal and other treasures, his wife and children will all complete the Eternal Dao Body Transformation one after another, reaching the entrance to the Eternal Dao Body, and with their strength, they can be called powerful in the Eternal Dao Realm, and they can easily kill those ordinary Eternal Dao Realms in seconds.

......

"The Eternal Decree is too mysterious, it is too difficult to completely refine the Eternal Decree and comprehend its internal origin!"

Ye Tian muttered.

He knew that it was impossible for him to completely control the Endless Realm now, and he still had to raise the Perfect-level Eternal Dao Body to the Perfection Realm before he could try to completely control the Eternal Realm and thus completely control the Endless Realm.

Subsequently, he paid attention to the human beings in the Endless Realm, and a large number of mythical Dao realms had been born, and these mythical Dao realms were placed in the Void Domain, that is, one by one, if so many elders went back, I am afraid that they would all have to scare the stupid Innate Origin Domain Alliance!

However, in the Eternal Realm, these myths to the Dao Realm are nothing at all.

In addition to these mythical Dao realms, there are more than a dozen people who have been promoted to the realm of Eternal Dao, all of them have their own chances, and there are also the Eternal Dao Secret Techniques that Ye Tian gave to human beings, and this kind of cultivation environment is much better than Ye Tian's original.

At the beginning, his resources and treasures were all earned by himself, but now, he is almost picking them up everywhere, he wants to inherit them, he wants resources to have resources, and if his cultivation is not fast, it will be strange.

At the beginning, they didn't take the path of superimposing the body of myths, otherwise they wouldn't have been able to cultivate so fast.

Before you know it, tens of millions of years have passed.

The Lord of the Gods summoned a meeting of all the lords.

So, Ye Tian also participated.

The meeting was in the kingdom of all gods, and Ye Tian set out from the endless kingdom and rushed to the kingdom of all gods.

The palace of the lord of the kingdom of all gods, the sixty-seven lords of the kingdom, plus the lord of the kingdom of all gods, that is the sixty-eight lords of the kingdom, which represents the sixty-eight eternal kingdoms.

One by one, the lords of the kingdom sat down and waited for the eternal lord to appear.

Rumble!!!!

A figure appeared on the main seat, and it was the lord of the great kingdom of all gods.

Many country lords stood up one after another and said respectfully: "I have seen the great lord of all gods!"

The Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods said: "Ladies and gentlemen, I have a few things to say about calling you over this time, the first thing is to welcome the newly born Lord of the Kingdom - Ye Tian, the Lord of the Ye Heaven Kingdom has opened up an endless country, and after a period of time, it will have to be fully opened." Take this opportunity to discuss the distribution of the eighty percent of the territory, if there are forces in your kingdom that need to be relocated, you can discuss with the Lord of Ye Tian to divide the territory. "

Hearing this, many lords of the country became interested, and they naturally wanted to let the forces that had a good relationship with them move over and share this cup of soup!

Subsequently.

These lords communicated with Ye Tian and began to allocate the amount of territory domains.

I saw that Ye Tian took out the territory of the Endless Realm, and first indicated that he wanted two percent of the territory, and these two percent of the territory must be connected together, and it is not allowed to be separated, which is also a rule, otherwise they will divide the territory and leave, and the other forces will not be happy.

Then, these lords began to discuss and divide, dividing up a piece of area, these areas will be given to one force after another, as for those forces, Ye Tian has the right to speak, but if Ye Tian does not choose, then it is up to these lords to choose.

Although many forces secretly contacted him and were willing to give him benefits and give them a part of the territory, Ye Tian didn't look down on those resources, so he didn't agree.

Let these lords arrange it!

Soon, these eighty percent of the territory was almost divided, and only after the 100 million Dao Era years had passed, these forces could move in.

Seeing that many country lords had discussed, the Great Lord of the Ten Thousand Gods continued: "The second thing, the strongest Eternal Dao Realm of the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance has suddenly turned into a demon seed, and now, a large number of demon seeds are raging within the Thousand Mountains Realm Alliance, and they are asking us for help, so we need you to send a group of Eternal Dao Realm to support in the past, this is also an order of the Eternal Realm Boundary Court, I must obey it!"

"Yes!"

Many lords of the country responded.

Immediately, they began to discuss how many Eternal Beings to send to the Dao Realm, but they couldn't support too much, otherwise there would be danger on their side, and no one knew if the six demon seed abysses would riot!
